name: Sausage Cacciatore
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry sausage until ¾ cooked (about 15 minutes).
2. Remove and set aside.
3. Cut and core the peppers, then slice into strips.
4. Peel and slice onions into strips. Fry pepper strips in sausage grease or add oil if needed.
5. Add onions and continue frying for about 5 minutes.
6. Chop garlic and add mushrooms, then fry for another 5 minutes.
7. Return the cooked sausage to the pan with the sauce and simmer on low until the meat is hot (about 10 minutes).
8. Serve as a "hot" dish in a hot and cold buffet. It can be served as a main dish with a side of pasta or rice, or made into a hot sandwich on Italian bread or a pocket sandwich on Syrian (pita) bread. It also makes great table art when placed on a white tablecloth. This versatile dish can be substituted with any type of meat.
Enjoy!
